name: get_screenshot
description:
Returns a screenshot of a node in a .pen file. Use nodeId "document" to screenshot the entire document.

Usage:
- Screenshots are expensive — use sparingly. Take one only after a complete section is done, not after every batch_design.
- Prefer the smallest meaningful node (a section frame, not the whole document) — large nodes use more tokens and obscure detail.
- Use snapshot_layout for structural/sizing checks; reach for a screenshot only when visual fidelity (color, type, alignment) is what you need to verify.

filePath.description: An optional file path to access a .pen file.

nodeId.description: ID of the node to take screenshot of, or "document" for the entire document
